ddls:
CREATE TABLE "startups" (
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each startup */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the startup company */,
  "valuation" TEXT /* Valuation of the startup */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the startup was added to the platform */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry in which the startup operates */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the startup is headquartered */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the startup is headquartered */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent where the startup is located */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the startup was founded */,
  "funding" TEXT /* Funding raised by the startup */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the startup */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the startup */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Name of the startup founder */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the startup's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startups_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_startups_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "investment_stage" TEXT /* Stage of investments made by the investor (e.g., seed, series A) */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investments made by the investor (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup receiving the investment */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor making the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the investment */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of investment round (e.g., seed, series A) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup for which the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., valuation, industry trend) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration event */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., investment strategy, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup related to the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_startup_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the startup */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., investor, partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_startup_relationships_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_startup_relationships_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., investment update, report generated) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
